scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev --name auto_sync
scripts.db:migrate:name: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:reset: cd server && npx prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.db:deploy: cd server && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: cd server && npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
